title: polygala calcarea subsp. corbariensis
intro: Polygala calcarea subsp. corbariensis, also known as Polygala corbariensis, is a rare, subspecies of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is native to Europe and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Polygala corbariensis can be found in supplement form, typically as capsules or teas, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
